===''Pokémon the Series''=== [[File:Olympia anime.png|thumb|250px|Olympia in {{aniseries|XY}}]] Olympia was mentioned, though not by name, in ''[[XY090|Tag Team Battle Inspiration!]]'', where it was revealed that [[Tierno]] challenged Olympia prior to meeting up with {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} again, but he lost. She debuted in ''[[XY092|Cloudy Fate, Bright Future!]]'', where she told the group about [[Ash's Frogadier]]'s past. She also predicted {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}}, along with {{TRT}}, will be the victims of a crisis, and then blocked Team Rocket's attempt to steal the giant sundial. It was also revealed that she had foreseen the battle between [[Primal Reversion|Primal]] {{DL|Super-ancient Pokémon (XY series)|Groudon}} and Primal {{DL|Super-ancient Pokémon (XY series)|Kyogre}} from ''[[XYS03|Mega Evolution Special III]]'', allowing the people of Kalos to take precautions for the weather anomalies caused by the clash of the [[Legendary Pokémon]]. In ''[[XY093|All Eyes on the Future!]]'', Olympia had a Gym battle against Ash. Eventually, Ash was able to defeat her, thus earning his seventh [[Kalos League]] Badge, the Psychic Badge. She also told {{an|Professor Sycamore}} about a vision she had seen from the [[S19|upcoming crisis]]. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY116|The Synchronicity Test!]]'' In ''[[XY118|Championing a Research Battle!]]'', Olympia spoke with [[Diantha]] about the threat that Kalos was to face in the future, and showed her a vision of {{p|Zygarde}}. She appeared in a fantasy in ''[[XY125|A League of His Own!]]'', when Ash was talking to [[Everett]] about the Gym Leaders that he had defeated in Kalos, in order for him to be able to compete in the [[Lumiose Conference]]. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Olympia was seen in her Gym, watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with her Pokémon. In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', Olympia and her two Meowstic were among those who helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. ====Character==== Olympia is pure-hearted and deeply empathetic. She holds a great deal of responsibility, foretelling her psychic predictions in a precise manner as to avoid any confusion. She often receives vivid visions of the past and future, causing her to flux in and out of a psychic state. The [[Anistar Gym]] also serves as a school for other Psychics, training them to reach their full potential. In battle, Olympia is equally precise. Her two {{p|Meowstic}} have been trained to support each other in battle and cover for any weaknesses. Olympia uses their full range of attacks and special abilities. ====Pokémon==== {{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Olympia |pkmn=Meowstic (×2) |type1=Psychic |img=Olympia Meowstic.png |cap=Olympia's Meowstic |epnum=XY092 |epname=Cloudy Fate, Bright Future! |vajp=Noriko Shitaya |vajpnote=Male |vaen=Sarah Natochenny |vaennote=both |desc=Olympia's {{p|Meowstic}} appeared in ''[[XY092|Cloudy Fate, Bright Future!]]'', where they sent {{TRT}} blasting off. They appeared again in ''[[XY093|All Eyes on the Future!]]'', where they were used by Olympia in her Gym battle against {{Ash}}. Both went up against {{AP|Frogadier}} and {{AP|Talonflame}}, and eventually lost. Her male Meowstic provides the stat boosts and defense in battle, while Olympia's female Meowstic often goes on the offensive. They reappeared in ''[[XY116|The Synchronicity Test!]]'' in a flashback. They reappeared in ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', where they were seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Olympia. They reappeared in ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', where they helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. They reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. The male Meowstic's known moves are {{m|Helping Hand}}, {{m|Light Screen}}, and {{m|Psyshock}}, and his Ability is {{a|Prankster}}. The female Meowstic's known moves are {{m|Future Sight}}, {{m|Dark Pulse}}, {{m|Psyshock}}, and {{m|Thunder Wave}}, and her Ability is {{a|Keen Eye}}.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{psychic color light}}|bordercolor={{psychic color dark}} |ja=勝生真沙子 ''[[Masako Katsuki]]'' |en=[[List of English voice actors|Catrin Lloyd Bollard]] |fi=Unknown voice actress ([[XY092]]-[[XY093]])
